role: Central template assets for the ArchSpine mirror system, providing reusable foundational documentation, prompt engineering components, configuration standards, and public API surface documentation.
responsibility: These templates collectively establish the architectural documentation, LLM prompt generation toolkit, code quality and naming rules, and external interface overview that support consistent development, maintenance, and operation of the ArchSpine mirror system.
